heroSubtitle: Comprehensive intensive care for complex medical conditions by board-certified intensivists
approachBody: Our critical care team provides 24/7 intensive care management for patients with serious medical and surgical conditions. CCPSA intensivists are board-certified in Critical Care Medicine and provide care across multiple AdventHealth and CommonSpirit hospitals in the Denver metro area.

items.title: ICU Management
items.description: Comprehensive care for medical and surgical patients requiring intensive care services.

items.title: Mechanical Ventilation
items.description: Advanced management and weaning strategies for patients requiring respiratory support.

items.title: Sepsis Management
items.description: Expert care for sepsis and multi-organ failure conditions using evidence-based protocols.

items.title: Hemodynamic Support
items.description: Monitoring and management of cardiovascular stability in critically ill patients.

items.title: Multidisciplinary Care
items.description: Coordinated care involving specialists across multiple disciplines for complex cases.

items.title: End-of-Life Care
items.description: Compassionate end-of-life care planning and family communication support.

items.title: Procedural Interventions
items.description: Tracheostomy and percutaneous gastrostomy placement and management.

ctaBody: Contact us today to learn more about our critical care services and schedule your consultation.
